auth.parentAccountHint: Your child will have their own kid-safe profile
auth.resetHint: Enter the email you used to sign up and we'll send you a reset link
auth.resetSentHint: Check your inbox and click the link in the email
auth.coppaConsent: I am the parent or legal guardian and I agree to
auth.errorPasswordWeak: Password must contain letters and numbers
auth.errorUserExists: This email is already registered. Sign in or reset your password.
auth.errorSignupDisabled: Sign-up is temporarily unavailable. Please try later.
auth.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please try again in a few minutes.
auth.errorNetwork: No internet connection. Check your connection.
auth.errorUnknown: Something went wrong. Please try later.
auth.deleteConfirm1Message: All data will be permanently removed. Cannot be undone.

onboarding.tutorialStart: Let me show you how to play

tapTheDot.name: Tap the dot
tapTheDot.rules:
A pink dot 🎯 will appear on the screen.

Your task — quickly tap right on it!

If you hit — great! If you miss — you'll see a thinking face and try again.

There are 5 dots per level. Fewer misses = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

countObjects.name: Count the apples
countObjects.question: How many apples?
countObjects.rules:
Apples 🍎 will appear on the screen.

Count them and enter the number using the keypad.

Tap ⌫ to erase, OK to answer.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

mathExpressions.name: Math Problems
mathExpressions.rules:
An ➕ addition or ➖ subtraction problem will appear.

Tap the correct answer from four options.

Numbers up to 10.

There are 5 problems per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

mathCompare.name: Compare
mathCompare.rules:
An empty box ⬚ appears between two numbers.

Pick the correct sign: > (greater), < (less) or = (equal).

Numbers up to 20.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

shapes.name: Shapes
shapes.rules:
A shape name will appear with 4 options.

Tap the shape whose name is written at the top.

Shapes: circle, square, triangle, rectangle.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

letters.name: Find the letter
letters.rules:
A letter will appear with 4 options.

Tap the same letter shown at the top.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

oddOneOut.name: Odd one out
oddOneOut.rules:
Four items will appear on screen.

Three of them belong together (e.g. fruits), but one doesn't fit.

Tap the one that doesn't belong!

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

lettersEn.name: Find the letter (EN)
lettersEn.rules:
A Latin letter will appear with 4 options.

Tap the same letter shown at the top.

ABC practice — letters A to T.

There are 5 tasks per level. Fewer mistakes = more stars:
⭐⭐⭐ no mistakes
⭐⭐ 1-2 mistakes
⭐ more

parent.scheduleHint: Coming soon: allowed hours for playing.
parent.activityEmpty: Stats will appear after the first game.
parent.pinSetupHint: PIN protects the parent panel from the child.
parent.pinHint: PIN is required to access the parent panel.
parent.pinForgotHint: Confirm the password for {{email}} to set a new PIN. Or send a password reset email.

profiles.deleteConfirmMsg: This child's progress will be lost.
